submissions.synthesis_method: Standard iQFT7: swap(0-6,1-5,2-4) for bit-reversal, then reverse+dagger of forward QFT with cs_dag..cr7_dag.
Greedy MMD-like synthesis with cnot-assisted negative controls for multi-control-X gates. cnot(0,qi) negates control qi before/after CkX gates to detect 0-patterns. 2996 gates.
submissions.self_check: Verified: 0 mismatches on all 32 work values under q0=1.

submissions.synthesis_method: Direct synthesis of y->(4y mod21) using same cnot+CkX method. 0 gates.
Direct synthesis of y->(16y mod21). 0 gates.
